Sports Scene

Copied

With the Summer Olympics back in the French capital after 100 years, Sideline Story asks what makes Paris 2024 different from previous editions of the Games? Also in this episode, we discuss our expectations for the performances of Chinese athletes in France, as well as our personal predictions for the highlights of this year's Olympics. In addition, we touch on how the new, trendy sports among Generation Z have changed the dynamics of the Games.
